zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Bunker於1698年6月24日出生在美國新罕布夏州斯特拉福德多福時，她的父親Joseph Bunker32歲，母親Mary E Denbo30歲。她於1718年5月20日與Clement Drew Sr在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德多福結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德多福

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Bunker于1698年6月24日出生在美国新罕布什尔州斯特拉福德多福时，她的父亲Joseph Bunker32岁，母亲Mary E Denbo30岁。她于1718年5月20日与Clement Drew Sr在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德多福结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Bunker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname, of Norman origin, for a reliable or good-hearted person, from Old French bon ‘good’ + cuer ‘heart’ (from Latin cor).
History: Bunker Hill in Charlestown, MA, was named as land assigned in 1634 to George Bunker of Charlestown, who had emigrated from Odell in Bedfordshire, England.

variants.name: Banker
meanings: English: from Middle English banker, banc(o)ur, bankquer, bankert ‘covering of tapestry or other fabric for a bench, couch, or chair; ornamental hanging’, possibly a nickname or occupational name for someone who made or sold such things.
English: occupational name possibly from Middle English benker, seemingly ‘maker of benches’ but recorded only in names.
English: perhaps a variant of   Bunker  .

variants.name: Bunkers
meanings: Possibly also an altered form of English   Bunker  .
In some cases possibly also Dutch: perhaps a variant of Benkers, itself a cognate of German Benkert . The surname Bunkers is very rare in the Netherlands.

variants.name: Boenker
meanings: occupational name for a carpenter, a rounded form of   Benker  .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.
George Washington elected first president of United States.

historicEvents.title: Concord Becomes the Capital
historicEvents.description: In 1808, Concord became the capital of New Hampshire. It was originally the Penacook Plantation given to the state by the Massachusetts Bay Colony.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Bunker was born on 24 June 1698, in Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, United States, her father, Joseph Bunker, was 32 and her mother, Mary E Denbo, was 30. She married Clement Drew Sr on 20 May 1718, in Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Bunker est née le 24 juin 1698, à Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, États-Unis, son père, Joseph Bunker, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Mary E Denbo, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Clement Drew Sr le 20 mai 1718, à Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Bunker è nata il il 24 giugno 1698 nel Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, Joseph Bunker, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Mary E Denbo, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Clement Drew Sr il 20 maggio 1718, nel Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Bunkerが1698年6月24日にアメリカ合衆国ニューハンプシャー州ストラフォードドバーで生まれた時，父Joseph Bunkerは32歳，母Mary E Denboは30歳であった。1718年5月20日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアストラフォードドバーでClement Drew Srと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。

ko.Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 도버
ko.Madbury, Strafford, New Hampshire, Briti: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 매드버이
ko.lifeSummary: Mary Bunker(이)가 1698년 6월 24일 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 스트래퍼드 도버에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Joseph Bunker(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary E Denbo(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1718년 5월 20일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 도버에서 Clement Drew Sr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Bunker nasceu em 24 de junho de 1698, em Dover, Strafford, Nova Hampshire, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Joseph Bunker, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Mary E Denbo, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Clement Drew Sr em 20 de maio de 1718, em Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Bunker родилась 24 июня 1698 г. в местности довир, страффорд, Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Joseph Bunker было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Mary E Denbo, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Clement Drew Sr 20 мая 1718 г. в местности довир, страффорд, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери.
